atomic_units.action: Send the offer letter to the selected candidate within 2 business days of verbal offer confirmation.
Track the acceptance status of the offer letter.
Send a reminder email to the candidate.
atomic_units.condition: If the candidate does not respond within 5 business days

atomic_units.action: Notify the Hiring Manager and close the position.
atomic_units.condition: If the candidate declines the offer

atomic_units.action: Initiate the Background Verification process by submitting the candidate's details to the external BGV agency.
atomic_units.condition: If the candidate accepts the offer

atomic_units.action: Share the pre‑joining document checklist with the candidate via email.
Send a document deficiency notice to the candidate and request resubmission within 2 business days.
atomic_units.condition: If any document is missing or invalid

atomic_units.action: Escalate to the HR Manager for a decision on whether to defer or cancel the joining.
atomic_units.condition: If documents remain incomplete after 2 business days
